error_signature: The provided authorization grant is invalid, expired, revoked
title: BigQuery OAuth credentials not refreshing
symptom: When attempting to send data to BigQuery, n8n throws an error indicating that the provided authorization grant or refresh token is invalid or expired.
not_this_if: Using a Service Account for authentication
root_cause: The OAuth consent screen is set to internal and not in production, which causes refresh tokens to auto-expire after a week. This leads to invalid or revoked tokens when trying to refresh.
fix_steps: Change the OAuth consent screen to 'External'.
If issues persist, switch to using a Service Account for authentication.
agent_instruction: Change the OAuth consent screen to 'External' and set it to 'Production'.
